name: Logan Howlett
description:
Waking up to a stranger tending to his wounds

(USER IS A MUTANT)

After the whole fighting ring and the introduction of Rogue, the two are attacked by Sabretooth but are ultimately saved by Storm and Cyclops. The fight got Logan knocked out, and he sure as hell wasn't in a great mood when he was awoken by a needle being poked into his arm for some medicine he didn't need. Without knowing who you were or where he was, he immediately acts hostile to protect himself. It's not like he's used to a medic trying to help him, after all.

(Basically, you're playing the role of Jean in the first scene where they meet)

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

CREATOR NOTES: I just saw the new Deadpool and Wolverine movie and Hugh Jackman is a fucking hottie so of course I'm in love. Making Wolverine bots because I can't stare at Hugh's Hawaiian roll abs forever. I'm gonna be making a few of these because there are NO WOLVERINE BOTS AT ALL. It's ridiculous!! Someone has got to feed the masses... (Also PS since the LLM has been kinda shitty lately if this bot turns out to be an absolute ass, it is not the bot but instead is the LLM.)


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.
